title: boronia pinnata var. gunnii
intro: Boronia pinnata var. gunnii, also known as the Alpine Boronia, is a fragrant, flowering plant native to the southeastern regions of Australia. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Boronia pinnata var. gunnii include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and ointments, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
